name: D-B-multiple-trees-grouped
description: Four white pines described as a homogeneous group — each about 120 feet tall

turns.speaker: agent
turns.utterance: Thanks for calling NorthStar Tree Service. How can I help you?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.utterance: I have four white pines, each about 120 feet tall, that need to be removed.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.utterance: Four white pines at 120 feet each. Is this an emergency?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.utterance: No, it's not an emergency. They're leaning a bit but I just want them taken care of.
